original_arabic_text: فَٱذۡكُرُونِيٓ أَذۡكُرۡكُمۡ وَٱشۡكُرُواْ لِي وَلَا تَكۡفُرُونِ

short_explanation.ar: تذكر الله يذكرك، واشكره على نعمه ولا تكفر بها.
short_explanation.en: Remember Allah, and He will remember you. Be grateful to Him and do not deny His favors.

translations.en: So remember Me; I will remember you. And be grateful to Me and do not deny Me.

original_arabic_text: نِعْمَتَانِ مَغْبُونٌ فِيهِمَا كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ: الصِّحَّةُ وَالْفَرَاغُ.
notification_excerpt: نِعْمَتَانِ مَغْبُونٌ فِيهِمَا كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ

short_explanation.ar: الصحة ووقت الفراغ نعمتان عظيمتان يغفل الكثيرون عن استغلالهما في طاعة الله.
short_explanation.en: Health and free time are two great blessings that many people fail to utilize in the obedience of Allah.

translations.en: There are two blessings which many people lose: (They are) health and free time for doing good.

original_arabic_text: ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَتَطۡمَئِنُّ قُلُوبُهُم بِذِكۡرِ ٱللَّهِۗ أَلَا بِذِكۡرِ ٱللَّهِ تَطۡمَئِنُّ ٱلۡقُلُوبُ

short_explanation.ar: ذكر الله يمنح القلب المؤمن سكينة وطمأنينة.
short_explanation.en: Remembering Allah brings reassurance and tranquility to the believing heart.

translations.en: Those who believe and whose hearts find comfort in the remembrance of Allah. Surely in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find comfort.

original_arabic_text: وَأَن لَّيۡسَ لِلۡإِنسَٰنِ إِلَّا مَا سَعَىٰ
notification_excerpt: وَأَن لَّيۡسَ لِلۡإِنسَٰنِ إِلَّا مَا سَعَىٰ

short_explanation.ar: للإنسان ثمرة سعيه، فليجتهد في العمل الصالح.
short_explanation.en: A person receives the outcome of their striving, so they should pursue righteous deeds.

translations.en: Each person will only have what they endeavoured towards.

original_arabic_text: إِنَّمَا الأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى.

short_explanation.ar: صلاح العمل وقبوله مرتبطان بالنية التي يحملها صاحبه.
short_explanation.en: The worth of an action is connected to the intention behind it.

translations.en: The reward of deeds depends upon the intentions, and every person will get the reward according to what they intended.

short_explanation.ar: الحياء المحمود خُلُق إيماني يحجز صاحبه عن القبيح.
short_explanation.en: Praiseworthy modesty is a quality of faith that restrains a person from wrongdoing.

translations.en: Leave him, for modesty is a part of faith.
